meaning: adj.[鍖籡鎸囩棄鐥呯殑,鎵嬭冻寰愬姩鐥囩殑
examples: Objective: to study the curative effect and methods of Acupotomy in athetoid cerebral palsy in this paper.
These seizures manifested not only focal convulsion of face or limb, but also choreoid or athetoid involuntary movements.
The incidence of language delay in children with diplegia, tetraplegia and athetoid were 45.95%, 90% and 64.7%, respectively.
